# Security Policy

## Supported versions

The following versions of KattoUI are currently supported with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| main    | :white_check_mark: |
| < main  | :x:                |

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in KattoUI, please report it privately by emailing **security@kattoui.dev** with:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- The affected version(s) or commit
- Any suggested remediation

We aim to acknowledge reports within 72 hours and will work with you to validate and address the issue responsibly.

Please do not open public issues or pull requests for security vulnerabilities.
